title: Unlocking asynchronicity in continuous batching
summary: 本文探讨了在连续批处理（continuous batching）中实现异步处理的方法，旨在提升推理系统的吞吐量和资源利用率。文章分析了同步批处理的瓶颈，并提出了异步调度、请求队列和动态批处理等策略，以解锁并发能力。
highlights: Continuous batching can be enhanced with asynchronous processing to avoid idle GPU time.
Asynchronous scheduling allows overlapping computation and data transfer.
Dynamic batching with request queues improves overall system efficiency.
